title: Amtech D0940 300mm (12'") Ratchet Speed clamp
features: VERSATILE: This 300mm (12'") ratchet speed clamp has 2-way reversible jaws and a quick release lever for ease of use
NON-MARKING: Strong and lightweight with nylon fibre-filled jaws, it has non-marking clamp pads
SIZE CAPACITY: 300mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
